summary:
SPIRITUAL ATMOSPHERE AND ECONOMIC FORECAST: Brandon describes sensing a heightened intensity in the spirit realm, comparing it to a strong heartbeat rather than a flatline. He identifies the 23rd of the month as a critical point of no return and a period of spiritual acceleration. During his prayers, Brandon witnessed a vision of a wealthy man secretly influencing a decision that reduced a financial swell from an expected 50 basis points to half that amount. He emphasizes that believers must use their spiritual authority to intercept such demonic interference. Furthermore, Brandon warns of a looming, unprecedented economic crash where societal morals will deteriorate to the point of extreme violence over basic necessities. In response, he urges families to establish strong spiritual routines and anticipates a massive end-time revival that will require billions of dollars in funding.

PROTECTION OF LAW ENFORCEMENT AND LOCAL JURISDICTIONS: Brandon reflects on a tragic incident involving three police officers in Pennsylvania to underscore the urgent need for spiritual covering over law enforcement, ICE, and Homeland Security. He encourages individuals to exercise their spiritual authority over their specific geographic jurisdictions, advising them to pray for godly judges, local officials, and the safety of neighborhood schools. By actively praying and applying the blood of Jesus over their communities, Brandon believes that Christians can prevent demonic plans from slipping through the cracks and can release angelic protection over those on the front lines of maintaining law and order.

THWARTING DEMONIC PLOTS AT COLLEGE EVENTS: Brandon shares a detailed vision of a planned attack intended to cause mass casualties at college football tailgate parties. He specifically sees a location marked by a downward-facing longhorn skeleton, a blonde girl in a white cowboy hat, and a stadium in the distance. The vision reveals a marginalized, angry young man dressed in black who is heavily influenced by demonic music, witchcraft, and internet chatter. Brandon describes the plot as involving uneducated individuals attempting to use homemade explosives, such as black powder in a tube, placed under vehicles. He actively prays for the FBI and Homeland Security to uncover these terroristic threats in online chat rooms and credits Donald Trump for giving wisdom to federal agencies to expose such dark internet activities.

HEAVENLY ENCOUNTERS AND CORRUPT OFFICIALS: Brandon discusses the phenomenon of individuals having near-death experiences to serve as end-time witnesses. He recounts a story shared by Sister Billye Brim about a man who died during the COVID pandemic, went to heaven, and returned with descriptions of Jesus's white war horses that perfectly matched Brandon's own visions. He also mentions authors like Mina Lee who have witnessed hell. Transitioning to worldly justice, Brandon declares that corrupt, liberal judges will soon be exposed and lose their positions, humorously comparing their impending joblessness to Jimmy Kimmel.

GEOPOLITICAL SHIFTS IN THE UNITED KINGDOM: Brandon focuses on the United Kingdom, specifically looking toward upcoming strategic decisions around the 23rd. He visualizes Donald Trump strategically influencing the British royals and the Prime Minister, describing the latter as a leader who easily sways like wheat in the wind and requires a strong front. Brandon notes the ongoing protests in the streets of England, interpreting them as a sign that the people are fed up and desire change. He fervently prays for the UK to experience a massive revival and transition from being a goat nation into a sheep nation.

BIBLICAL DECREES FOR NATIONAL AND LEADERSHIP PROTECTION: Brandon concludes his spiritual intercession by heavily relying on the promises of Deuteronomy 28:7 and Psalm 91. He issues strong protective prayers over President Trump and his entire family, including Don Jr., Eric, Barron, and Melania, as well as the Vice President and Supreme Court justices. His prayers extend to invoke a hedge of protection around major American cities such as Chicago, Boston, Philadelphia, New York, and Washington D.C. Brandon steadfastly decrees that any enemies or demonic forces rising against the nation, its leaders, or its youth will be soundly defeated and forced to scatter in multiple directions.
rawData: [September 19, 2025]-[Praying over college campuses and big gatherings]-[https://youtu.be/tZEOxoJMC90]-[Well, praise the Lord, family. I'm excited to be here tonight. Sorry if my voice is kind of raspy; it's from the drainage from the pollen. It's a seasonal thing, you know. I have some things on my heart to talk to y'all about. Whenever you're praying, you can feel the intensity of the heartbeat. As you are praying, you can feel if it's a flatline versus if there's activity, and right now, it feels like there are major heartbeats where we are. Next week is a very important week, as we all know. It will lay to rest a lot of things. I believe as we come into the 23rd and we get ready to have this acceleration of things, the point of no return. I could see the wave—not a wave, because a wave starts to move out and you see it going like this—but it was a swell. I saw the ripple, the way the water was moving, and I could see it was getting big. And the Lord said, 'You'll see this on Wednesday.' And I said, 'What are we going to see on Wednesday?' He goes, 'Pray about it. It should be 50. What you're praying into is 50 basis points.' So as I was praying, I saw a certain man influencing the decision that was made on Wednesday. As I was watching, because I don't give you numbers all the time, but I saw it was supposed to be bigger. It came out half of what we were praying over privately, my wife and I, because I saw a man influencing on the opposite party in the middle of the night, a decision that was being made. And because of the influence behind these men, they have a lot of money and they push things the way they want it to go. So when I told you this is the devil's wheelhouse, you must stand with your authority of a believer and pray. When I'm seeing in the spirit and I'm praying over things, visions change the outcome. My job on YouTube and, as I believe, as a watchman is to bring you things to pray about. Prayer either makes it or breaks it. Does that make sense? If you don't intercede as a believing believer and use your authority—and you say, 'Well, why do we have to use it?'—it's because whatsoever things you bind on earth are whatsoever things are loosed, and whatsoever things are bound are dependent upon what you do, and you have to do it. Jesus told you to do it. So, we use our authority as believing believers and pray until Adam's lease is up. Things will change. So, I was annoyed with what I saw because I saw the swell needs to be bigger. We're running out of time. We have a window, and in this window, we will bring in the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen before, from sea to shining sea, all around the world. But the enemy tries to delay things in his own little way, how he tries to do things. It will take billions and billions of dollars to support this major revival that's about to take place. I bring things out and I pray about it with you because I try to be as discreet as I can be and say, 'This is what we're praying over.' So number three, I saw the three officers that were taken out in Pennsylvania. A very tragic situation took place. Remember, I saw three police officers being shot. And the Lord told me, 'We must pray over our law enforcement, our ICE, our Homeland Security, and our people who are out fighting on the front lines protecting us, giving law and order to our great nation.' We must pray for our people who are out there. You know what? That's somebody's son, that's somebody's daughter, that's somebody's family out there risking their lives. They're putting people's lives in danger just by their careless driving. And so that's why I feel like it's really important as believers that you have authority in your area. Where are you in your area?
